context: Owl is an open-source terminal tool for crafting, spawning, managing, and interacting with AI agents.
guardrails: Use Conventional Commits format for all commits: feat:, fix:, docs:, style:, refactor:, test:, chore:, etc.
Commit messages must be descriptive and follow the format: <type>(<scope>): <description>
Example: feat(install): add sed-based tag parsing for GitHub releases
